recipe_name: Nutrient-Rich Salmon Fillet & White Rice Mash
preparation_steps: Thoroughly cook the Salmon Fillet in a pan until fully cooked through.
Prepare the White Rice by boiling or steaming according to standard cooking guidelines.
Steam or finely chop the vegetables (Broccoli, Carrots) so they are easily digestible.
Mix the cooked Salmon Fillet, White Rice, and vegetables together in a large bowl.
Drizzle with Flaxseed Oil and let the mixture cool completely before serving.

Prepare the Brown Rice by boiling or steaming according to standard cooking guidelines.
Steam or finely chop the vegetables (Carrots, Spinach) so they are easily digestible.
Mix the cooked Cod Fillet, Brown Rice, and vegetables together in a large bowl.
Drizzle with Flaxseed Oil and let the mixture cool completely before serving.

Add the Spinach in the last 5 minutes of simmering to soften it.
Puree or mash the mixture to a fine Puree consistency suitable for cats.
Stir in the Flaxseed Oil to provide essential omega fatty acids.
Allow the meal to cool to room temperature before serving to your cat.

recipe_name: Crisp & Garden Fresh Carrots & Cilantro Herbal Salad
preparation_steps: Provide a large base of fresh, clean Timothy Hay.
Thoroughly wash the leafy greens: Cilantro, Romaine Lettuce.
Finely chop the greens and the Carrots sweet component.
Toss the greens and sweet treats together.
Scatter the mixture over the hay base to encourage natural foraging behaviors.

Thoroughly wash the leafy greens: Parsley, Dill, Kale, Cilantro.
Finely chop the greens and the Blueberries sweet component.
Toss the greens and sweet treats together.
Scatter the mixture over the hay base to encourage natural foraging behaviors.

recipe_name: Wholesome Pumpkin Seeds & Apple (no seeds) Seed Chop
preparation_steps: Gently cook the grain (Oatmeal) and let it cool completely.
Wash and finely dice the fruits/vegetables (Apple (no seeds), Carrots, Broccoli).
Mix the diced fruit/vegetables with the cooked Oatmeal.
Stir in the fresh Pumpkin Seeds mix.
Serve in a clean feeding dish. Remove any uneaten soft food after 2-4 hours to prevent spoilage.

Wash and finely dice the fruits/vegetables (Carrots, Broccoli, Sweet Potato).
Mix the diced fruit/vegetables with the cooked Barley.
Stir in the fresh Safflower Seeds mix.
Serve in a clean feeding dish. Remove any uneaten soft food after 2-4 hours to prevent spoilage.

Mix the diced fruit/vegetables with the cooked Barley.
Stir in the fresh Millet mix.
Serve in a clean feeding dish. Remove any uneaten soft food after 2-4 hours to prevent spoilage.
